reviews.review_msg: REALLY unapproachable and is very set on her own agenda, which discourages open conversation.  I know a lot of other students were intimidated out of participating in class because of her overly harsh manner.  I also don't feel like I learned anything in this class.  My marks were top but the experience was a fail!

I think Kate is an extremely intelligent woman with great interest in what she is teaching.  She can be a bit pessimistic and moody at times but that comes from her realistic approach on life.  Her feedback can be a bit rough, but it is honest and motivating.  Her grading is fair despite the comments.  She delivers the material very well.

I enjoyed Kate's teaching style. She's tough, she's bold and isn't afraid to approach contentious topics - really made the coursework come alive for me. You need to be confident and strong when approaching her, and speaking in class; if you can do this, you will win her respect and the class will be more enjoyable for you.

Absolutely the worst TA I've ever met in my entire life. Opinionative, egostic, self-centered, rude, has major attitude problems, disorganized during lectures, completely biased, and refused to mark the exam properly. She has to be the worst of the worst in SFU. I want my money back. It's a complete waste for this course.
Took this course by distance ed. with Kate as tutor-marker. She's a pretty easy marker.
